chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No. S- 91 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of Main Case 08-05-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant P.G. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant states that this Crl. Transfer Application has become infructuous; hence, under instructions, he does not press the same. Accordingly, instant Crl. Transfer Application stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
